message.content:
Explore the testing configuration in this monorepo:

1. Check the vitest configuration in packages that have tests vs those that don't
2. Find packages/prettier-plugin/package.json and vitest.config.ts (if exists)
3. Check packages/tools vitest config to compare
4. Find how Turbo handles test tasks in turbo.json

I need to understand why @belt/prettier-plugin tests fail (no test files found) and how to fix it while maintaining proper test coverage for packages that DO have tests.

content.text: I'll explore the testing configuration in this monorepo systematically. Let me start by examining the structure and then comparing vitest configurations.
Now let me check the package structure and look for the prettier-plugin package:

file.content:
{
  "name": "@belt/prettier-plugin",
  "version": "0.0.987",
  "description": "Prettier plugin for standardizing line breaks and multi-line formatting",
  "type": "module",
  "sideEffects": false,
  "author": "Antonio Presto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>",
  "license": "MIT",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt",
    "directory": "packages/prettier-plugin"
  },
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/issues"
  },
  "homepage": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/tree/main/packages/prettier-plugin#readme",
  "main": "./dist/index.cjs",
  "module": "./dist/index.mjs",
  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/index.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/index.cjs"
    }
  },
  "files": [
    "dist"
  ],
  "scripts": {
    "build": "vite build",
    "dev": "vite build --watch",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest --watch",
    "coverage": "vitest --coverage",
    "check": "run-s check:*",
    "check:types": "tsc --noEmit",
    "check:lint": "eslint src --fix",
    "check:format": "prettier --write ."
  },
  "keywords": [
    "prettier",
    "prettier-plugin",
    "formatting",
    "line-breaks",
    "multiline"
  ],
  "peerDependencies": {
    "prettier": "^3.0.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@eslint/js": "^9.39.2",
    "@types/node": "^25.0.3",
    "eslint": "^9.39.2",
    "prettier": "^3.7.4",
    "rollup-plugin-node-externals": "^8.1.2",
    "terser": "^5.44.1",
    "typescript": "^5.8.3",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.52.0",
    "vite": "^7.3.0",
    "vite-plugin-dts": "^4.5.4",
    "vite-plugin-externalize-deps": "^0.10.0",
    "vite-tsconfig-paths": "^6.0.3",
    "vitest": "^4.0.16",
    "npm-run-all": "^4.1.5"
  }
}

file.content:
{
  "name": "@belt/tools",
  "description": "TypeScript utility library with runtime type validation, state management, and common helpers",
  "type": "module",
  "sideEffects": false,
  "version": "0.0.987",
  "author": "Antonio Presto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>",
  "license": "MIT",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt",
    "directory": "packages/tools"
  },
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/issues"
  },
  "homepage": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/tree/main/packages/tools#readme",
  "keywords": [
    "typescript",
    "validation",
    "state-management",
    "schema",
    "runtime-types",
    "helpers",
    "utilities"
  ],
  "main": "./dist/index.cjs",
  "module": "./dist/index.mjs",
  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/index.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/index.cjs"
    },
    "./schema": {
      "types": "./dist/schema.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/schema.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/schema.cjs"
    },
    "./state-machine": {
      "types": "./dist/state-machine.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/state-machine.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/state-machine.cjs"
    }
  },
  "files": [
    "dist"
  ],
  "scripts": {
    "build": "vite build",
    "dev": "vite build --watch",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest --watch",
    "coverage": "vitest --coverage",
    "check": "run-s check:*",
    "check:types": "tsc --noEmit",
    "check:lint": "eslint src --fix",
    "check:format": "prettier --write ."
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "date-fns": "^4.1.0",
    "immer": "^11.1.3",
    "lodash": "^4.17.21",
    "lru-cache": "^11.2.4",
    "minimatch": "^10.1.1",
    "typebox": "^1.0.73"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@belt/prettier-plugin": "0.0.987",
    "@eslint/js": "^9.39.2",
    "@types/lodash": "^4.17.21",
    "@types/node": "^25.0.3",
    "@types/react": "^19.2.7",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react-swc": "^4.2.2",
    "eslint": "^9.39.2",
    "npm-run-all": "^4.1.5",
    "prettier": "^3.7.4",
    "prettier-plugin-organize-imports": "^4.3.0",
    "rollup-plugin-node-externals": "^8.1.2",
    "terser": "^5.44.1",
    "typescript": "^5.9.3",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.52.0",
    "vite": "^7.3.0",
    "vite-plugin-dts": "^4.5.4",
    "vite-plugin-externalize-deps": "^0.10.0",
    "vite-tsconfig-paths": "^6.0.3",
    "vitest": "^4.0.16"
  }
}

    10→  },
